title: Not Full Not  Hurt
description: Hurt mobs can only be done when the attack cooldown is full.
body:
# Not Full Not Hurt 

It is a simple yet powerful Minecraft mod. It tweaks a small detail in combat, bringing a new experience to players.  

*   Attack Cooldown Restriction: Players can only perform a swing action when the attack cooldown is completely finished.  
*   No Swing Animation: Cancels the swing animation if the cooldown is not yet finished, enhancing the gameplay experience.
